pathfinder.position: Probe for deal with Dealer while window open. Hold all territory as non-negotiable minimum.

ironhand.position: Attrition manageable. Can sustain limited offensive.

compass.position: Sanctions devastating. Western assets frozen. Back-channel to Columbia: offer oil deal for sanctions relief.

final_decision: Round 1: Pathfinder probing for deal. Military: offensive. Economy: strained. OPEC: high production for revenue.
